name: conflict record carries a proposed_resolution suggestion produced by the reconciler subagent
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus && printf '{"pattern_id":"p1","matched_rule_id":"r-x","classification":"conflict","proposed_resolution":"narrow-scope-of-existing"}\n' > decision.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/surface-conflict.sh" --decision decision.json --log pr-corpus/decisions.jsonl 2>err.txt && grep -q '"proposed_resolution":"narrow-scope-of-existing"' pr-corpus/decisions.jsonl && echo ok 1>&2
